search_parameters.q: best nightlife bars in Portland, OR

search_information.query_displayed: best nightlife bars in Portland, OR

local_results.title: Raven's Manor
local_results.description: Drinks & bites in a horror-themed bar. Eerie destination with a supernatural motif offering creative cocktails & hearty meals.
local_results.user_review: "The drinks taste good and have their own entertainment value."

local_results.title: The Midnight PDX & The Six Venue
local_results.user_review: "Beautiful place, great cocktails, great staff, great music."

local_results.title: Kasa Nightclub Portland
local_results.description: Trendy nightspot featuring DJs, Latin beats and an ample bar, as well as bottle-service tables.
local_results.user_review: "Amazing music, great atmosphere and the security was top notch."

local_results.title: District Nightclub
local_results.description: Cocktails & snacks in an urban speakeasy. Chic lounge with a Roaring '20s vibe, craft cocktails & a light fare menu, plus DJs on the weekends.
local_results.user_review: "Great atmosphere, drinks are reasonably priced and the staff are amazing."

local_results.title: Secret Grove

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review:
"The atmosphere and music
is low key dreamy & the espresso martini is epic."

local_results.title: Rachel & Rose
local_results.user_review: "awesome service, great price, even better drinks!!"

local_results.title: Rum Club
local_results.description: Cozy cocktail spot with a tropical bent. Compact lounge with a chill vibe & horseshoe-shaped bar specializing in tropical cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "Great atmosphere, creative drinks and talented bartenders."

local_results.title: Multnomah Whiskey Library
local_results.description: Clubby hideaway with a huge spirits list. Cozy upstairs lounge with brick walls & a vintage feel features 1,500+ spirits & small plates.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Great drink, great atmosphere and top-flight service!"

local_results.title: The Coffin
local_results.description: Horror-themed bar with eclectic events. Dark Goth bar with horror-themed decor, hosting concerts, burlesque shows, tarot readings & more.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Amazing djs, great music, and super freindly staff."

local_results.title: BIZU
local_results.user_review: "Great vibes, black people, good people and good music."

local_results.title: Scotch Lodge
local_results.description: Stylish spot for whiskey & refined bites. Whiskey-focused cocktail bar with elevated Pacific Northwest-inspired small plates & a vintage vibe.
local_results.user_review: "The cocktails are amazing and the atmosphere is out of this world."

local_results.title: Fools and horses
local_results.description: Quirky cocktail spot, serving creative cocktails, beer and wine in a cozy space.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Great vibes, delicious cocktails, and friendly service."

local_results.title: Bible Club PDX
local_results.description: Retro speakeasy with drinks & snacks. Antiques-filled speakeasy serving inventive & classic cocktails plus small bites in stylish digs.
local_results.user_review: "Unique and cool spot, solid drinks, food, music and atmosphere."

local_results.title: Teardrop Lounge
local_results.description: Hot spot for cocktail connoisseurs. Classic & inventive cocktails with top-shelf spirits by talented mixologists in a chic, buzzy space.

parking: Usually difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Unique cocktails (all less than $18), amazing vibes, superb service!"

local_results.title: Grandma's Secret
local_results.user_review: "Amazing cocktails in a cool speakeasy setting."

local_results.title: Driftwood Room
local_results.description: Sleek, retro-inspired spot for cocktails. Swanky retro cocktail lounge in the Hotel deLuxe serving champagne cocktails & actor-named martinis.
local_results.user_review: "The bartenders are great, and the ambience is superb."

local_results.title: Quality Bar
local_results.description: Hip cocktail bar with pizza & craft beer. Low-key watering hole featuring craft brews, house cocktails, pizza & a nostalgic vibe.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Awesome bartenders, great drinks, and the vibe is awesome."

local_results.title: Dream House bar
local_results.description: Cozy bar that feels like a home, with a patio and upstairs seating.
local_results.user_review: "Amazing vibe, cool staff, awesome DJ's, and delicious cocktails."

local_results.title: Scooter McQuades
local_results.description: Irish bar with late hours & Jell-O shots. Irish bar in a narrow space with wood-paneled walls is a stop for Jell-O shots & clam chowder.
local_results.user_review: "Great atmosphere, great music, great customer service."

local_results.title: Calle 6 Night Club
local_results.user_review: "Great atmosphere , good bottle service and great music"
